title: Alpha-synuclein immunochemistry on STC-1 cells using DAB
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3ttna","text":"This protocol describes how to visualise alpha-synuclein in STC-1 cells by DAB immunohistochemistry. It also works for other antibodies (e.g. 5-HT, CCK, GLP).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"7e7fj","text":"Rabbit anti-alpha-synuclein         ab212184                     Abcam","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"erq4c","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6r5ls","text":"Rabbit anti-beta-actin                   ab241153                    Abcam","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1ao2l","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5sp8q","text":"Goat anti-rabbit IgG biotin        111-065-144-JIR        Stratech","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"amlah","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"10anc","text":"Streptavidin                                 POD11089153001    Roche","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Thaw frozen 24-well plates containing fixed cells grown on glass coverslips
Block with 10 % goat serum in PBS containing 0.005 % Triton™ X-100 and 0.05 % thimerosal 01:00:00
Incubate with rabbit anti-alpha-synuclein (1:500) (Abcam, ab212184) in 10 % goat serum containing 0.005 % Triton™ X-100 and 0.05 % thimerosal (block buffer) 20:00:00
Incubate with biotinylated goat anti-rabbit IgG (1:500) (Stratech, 111-065-144-JIR) in 2 % goat serum containing 0.005 % Triton™ X-100 and 0.05 % thimerosal (antibody buffer) 02:00:00
Incubate with 1:250 streptavidin-HRP (Roche, 11089153001) for 1 hour in antibody buffer 01:00:00
Visualise staining by incubation with PBS containing 0.05 % (w/v) 3,3′-Diaminobenzidine/0.015 % (v/v) H 2 O 2 /0.05 % (w/v) nickel ammonium sulphate for ≤ 00:03:00
Rinse for > 00:05:00 in running tap water
Remove coverslips from wells and mount on microscope slides with Hydromount™ (National Diagnostics)
Grow STC-1 cells on 12 mm glass coverslips treated with poly-D-lysine or Geltrex™.
Fix cells with 4 % paraformaldehyde 00:15:00 Paraformaldehyde is toxic by inhalation 158127 (sigmaaldrich.com)
Aspirate and discard PBS and freeze cells < -20 °C
creator: Michael J Hurley
